title: Add Product Quick View Modal
description: Create a modal that shows product details when clicking a 'Quick View' button.
requirements: Quick View button overlays product card
Modal shows larger image, details, and add-to-cart
Close on ESC and overlay click
solution: Create a dialog with product data. Toggle aria-hidden. Trap focus by cycling through focusable elements.

title: Build a Multi-Step Checkout Form
description: Replace the checkout button with a 3-step checkout form (Shipping → Payment → Confirmation).
requirements: Step 2: Payment info with card styling
solution: Each step is a div. On 'Next', validate required fields, increment step, update progress bar width. On final, show success.

title: Implement Product Filtering with JavaScript
description: Build a full filtering system that filters products by category, price range, and rating.
solution: Store product data in JS array. On filter change, filter array, re-render grid with filtered items. Use dataset attributes for categories.
